intro: Javorkaea scabra, also known as Javorkaea, is a flowering plant species in the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Javorkaea scabra include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Javorkaea scabra is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
